Name: Ford
1Q: What technology was introduced by Henry Ford in car manufacturing?
tip1: Henry Ford revolutionized car manufacturing with assembly line.
2Q: How much Ford manufactured the T models?
tip2: The Model T was Ford's first mass-produced automobile, manufactured for 19 years.
3Q: Which is the first car that won 24 Hours of Le Mans 4 times in a row?
tip3: The GT40 model was made specially to break the dominance of the Ferrari in 24 Hours of Le Mans.
4Q: Which generation of Ford Mustang did not have the GT version?
tip4: The most powerful models of Ford Mustang has the Shelby GT500 badge.
5Q: By what engine configuration is Shelby Mustang known?
tip5: For generations, the Ford Mustang has used multiple types of powerful V8 engines.
6Q: Which automotive engineering company, then owned by Ford, redesigned the Sierra and Escort models for rally racing?
tip6: Cosworth is well known as an engine donor to racing cars and Formula One teams.
7Q: Which Ford model was the base for the first Monster truck?
tip7: Bigfoot is the first Monster truck originally began as a 1974 Ford F-250 pickup that was modified by its owner Bob Chandler.
8Q: How is named the highest-performance versions of the Ford Ranger and F-Series?
tip8: F-Series and Ranger Raptor spell FORD in the grille (last used by Ford in 1983).
9Q: Which turbocharged gasoline engine series Ford started producing in 2009?
tip9: EcoBoost engines are available as inline 3 and 4 cylinders and V6.
10Q: Which model in 2019 Ford reincarnated as an SUV?
tip10: The new Puma SUV use mild-hybrid technology.
